operator_steps: Review room-runtime-adapter-plan.json and every room runtime plan.
Review the agent_turn_plan and agent briefs before enabling live model invocation.
Review output_draft_refs carried by each room and agent turn before enabling live model invocation.
Review agent_turn_command_plan plus agent-turn-prompts/ and agent-turn-contracts/ before per-agent execution.
Configure a supported live adapter, provider and model.
Fill human-approval-template.json before any model invocation.
Keep GitHub, source repo, merge and production mutations blocked.
